---
title: "mRNA Analysis"
---

The final mRNA analysis uses edgeR on `data/processed/mrna/all_counts.xlsx`. Genes were filtered at CPM > 1 in at least two samples, normalized with TMM, and tested with negative-binomial generalized linear models and likelihood-ratio tests.

Final counts:

- IL-4 versus Vehicle: 769 nominal-discovery genes and 536 FDR-significant genes.
- IL-13 versus Vehicle: 697 nominal-discovery genes and 445 FDR-significant genes.
- Same-direction shared genes: 546 nominal-discovery genes and 379 FDR-significant genes.

CEMIP, TNC, and LIFR are positively induced and FDR significant after both cytokines.
